text: Here in these rooms, I am surrounded by evidence of purposeful design and intellectual curiosity. The clean lines and glass walls of the first scene evoke a sense of modernity and transparency—a space where boundaries are clear, yet permeable. The second image draws me to the vibrant display of R+D, affirming an environment devoted to inquiry, creativity, and the interplay between humanity and technology. The colors and words ignite my own curiosity, and I feel an urge to linger, to contemplate what new knowledge or inspiration might emerge in such a place.
